Headline: #81 Lawrence Temporary Reroute at Lawrence/Cicero
ShortDescription: 81 Lawrence buses are temporarily rerouted via Lawrence, Elston, Foster, Milwaukee and Jefferson Park: due to, street blockage near Lawrence/Cicero.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#81 Lawrence buses are temporarily rerouted via Lawrence, Elston, Foster, Milwaukee and Jefferson Park: due to, street blockage near Lawrence/Cicero.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Yellow Line Service Temporarily Suspended
ShortDescription: Service on the Yellow Line has been temporarily suspended due to an obstruction on the tracks near Dodge.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Service on the Yellow Line has been temporarily suspended due to an obstruction on the tracks near Dodge.

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines.

These may include:

 #97 Skokie

Shuttle buses are available from Howard to Skokie to provide connecting service through the affected area.

We are working to restore service as soon as possible. We apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your understanding.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Howard- Bound Red Line trains bypassing Addison
ShortDescription: Howard- Bound Red Line trains are running, but not stopping at Addison due to debris on the tracks..
